overview: To become a tertiary level academic and research center of excellence in the field of Software Engineering for creating global leaders with high self-esteem who are able to accept and overcome challenges in a fast-changing environment.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota
eligibility: Students having minimum 2.5 GPA in both SSC/Dakhil/Vocational and HSC/Alim/A-Level. Students who have obtained A-STEM subjects may apply for admission. Students completing five B.Sc. subjects at A-level and minimum 4.0 GPA. The applicants must have Physics and Mathematics both at A-level and A-grade.
contact: Admission Helpline: +880 961 790 1212, Daffodil Smart City, Birulia, Savar, Dhaka 1216
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
